title: AdapterSignal
description: Public input contract for WorldLoops Adapter SDK. External connectors use this schema to pass signals into the WorldLoops reconciliation pipeline.

source.description: Signal source identifier (e.g. slack, gmail, github, calendar, linear, notion)

sourceType.description: Signal type within the source (e.g. message, thread, event, pr, issue, notification)

externalWrite.description: Must be false. WorldLoops does not accept adapter signals that imply external writes.

text.description: The signal content — the primary text that WorldLoops will normalize into an open-loop candidate

observedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the signal was observed by the connector (e.g. 2026-05-19T10:30:00.000Z)

url.description: Optional reference URL to the source record

summary.description: Optional human-readable summary of the signal

metadata.description: Optional additional metadata from the source connector
